title: Support - Device page Go button
scenario: Verify that tapping the "Go" button on a paired device's detail modal opens the Poly Contact Support page in a browser.
steps: Verify that a list of paired devices is displayed.
Tap on a device from the list.
Verify that a modal appears showing device details: name, product ID, serial number, software version, headset revision, and last connected.
Verify that the modal contains a 'Go' button.
Verify that the Poly Contact Support page opens in a browser.
expected: Tapping the "Go" button opens the Poly Contact Support page in a browser.
